prompt:
Goal: Create a high-fashion editorial collage featuring 20 female fashion model cutouts with intentionally blurred, anonymous faces, arranged among oversized translucent satin ribbons.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, clean off-white studio background, glossy magazine look, no text, no logo, no border.

Layout: Fill the frame with overlapping portraits and full-body fashion figures at different scales, layered behind and in front of sweeping ribbon loops. Include exactly 20 visible model cutouts: 1 far-left full-body model in a teal metallic halter mermaid gown; 2 upper center-left bust in a gold satin blazer; 3 upper center back-view model in a black strappy open-back dress; 4 upper center-right bust in a dusty rose draped top; 5 small upper right-center head-and-shoulders portrait inside a ribbon loop; 6 upper right bust in a deep teal robe with plunging neckline; 7 far-right full-body model in a purple metallic strapless mermaid gown; 8 lower far-left partial blurred head; 9 left-middle bust in a pale pink satin blazer; 10 center-middle bust in a gold satin blazer; 11 middle-right bust in a dusty rose draped top; 12 right-middle bust in a gold satin blazer; 13 right-middle bust in a purple metallic corset top; 14 far-right full-body model in a teal strapless mermaid gown; 15 bottom-left partial bust in a dark silver metallic garment; 16 lower-left bust in a teal metallic wrap top; 17 lower-center bust in a gold satin blazer; 18 lower center-right partial bust in dusty rose draping; 19 lower right-center small partial portrait partly hidden by ribbons; 20 bottom-right bust in a purple metallic corset top. Add exactly 2 plain vertical skin-tone rectangular censor blocks floating over the collage, one near left-center and one near lower-center, matching the blurred face color.

Subject details: All models are adult women with dark hair styled in messy updos, faceless/anonymous with rectangular soft blur masks over their faces. Clothing should emphasize shiny satin, metallic lamé, sculptural eveningwear, plunging necklines, corsetry, wrap tops, blazers, and mermaid silhouettes. Use teal, purple, gold, dusty rose, silver.

Ribbon design: Use large interwoven translucent ribbons sweeping diagonally and vertically across the entire image like elegant figure-eight loops. Ribbons should be glossy, semi-transparent, and layered, in teal, amethyst purple, champagne gold, and blush pink. They should partially obscure some models and create depth, with realistic highlights and shadows.

Visual style: Photorealistic fashion editorial mixed with surreal collage, sharp clothing detail, smooth studio lighting, high contrast metallic reflections, polished luxury aesthetic, dense overlapping composition.

Constraints: No readable text, no watermark, no extra objects, keep all faces blurred or obscured, preserve the exact count of 20 model cutouts and 2 skin-tone censor rectangles.
